    www/Stikked: fix MYSQL option

    Building www/Stikked with mysqli using Poudriere on FBSD 14.0-p5,
    it works perfectly fine. There's no reason for this to continue
    to be marked as BROKEN for MySQL/MariaDB.

    PR:             277497
